ops.text: AMENDMENT (pre-spend, before dispatch): cost-guard for the test phase. The driver measures actual per-call cost during the dev-50 phase and projects each subsequent phase before committing. If the dev-50 winner's projected test pass (241 × its sample count + 241 baseline) breaches the remaining budget under the $20 cap: fall back to the CHEAPEST arm that also beat baseline on dev-50; if no affordable arm beat baseline, close the experiment DEV-ONLY (test untouched, outcome 'dev-signal-only, cost-bound') and report to synthesis — a follow-up with a raised cap is a user decision, never the driver's. Test subsetting is forbidden (it would change the instrument). This fallback ladder is part of the registration; the driver has no other discretion at the test gate.
